creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Update audio/denemo from 0.8.14_1 to 0.9.0
There was a PR:ports/155188 to update denemo to an older version (probably to be closed since it is being superseded by this one): I did it a little bit different (I hope, it is OK).

At deinstall something is not OK?  I don't understand it.
I used portlint and genplist.  But I am not good at porting :-(

Greetings,
 Kalten
